stories.link_text: strait that carries a fifth of world oil.

stories.intro: A World Cup final under smoke
stories.body: Canadian wildfire haze, travel chaos and political tension are all shadowing New York's staging of the tournament's climax, where Messi's Argentina faces Spain amid concern that
stories.link_text: the air itself could disrupt the game.
